sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نُحَافِظَ عَلَى خُصُوصِيَّتِنَا عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo čuvati našu privatnost prilikom korištenja interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We must maintain our privacy when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُشَارِكْ مَعْلُومَاتِكَ الشَّخْصِيَّةَ مَعَ أَشْخَاصٍ غُرَبَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Ne dijeli svoje lične podatke sa strancima.
sentences.translationEn: Do not share your personal information with strangers.

sentences.arabic: غَيَّرَ أَحْمَدُ كَلِمَةَ السِّرِّ لِحِسَابِهِ بَعْدَ مُشْكِلَةٍ تِقَنِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je promijenio lozinku svog računa nakon tehničkog problema.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed changed his account password after a technical problem.
